data.name: 異世界鬼譚 墮於快樂的澪月
data.detailed_description:
▌故事內容

霜村澪月文武雙全，且充滿正義感。 她每天都過著充實的校園生活。

某天回家的路上，當她走在斑馬線上時，眼前突然被一道亮光壟罩，

等她回過神來，已經穿越到異世界來了……！

她來到的是一個被稱為大鬼的存在所統治，威脅著人類的和風世界。

充滿正義感的澪月為了戰鬥，與妖狐的巫女――紅羽、以及女忍者的――雫那一起攜手合作，

一邊慘遭色色，一邊對抗強大的敵人！

▌遊戲內容

・戰鬥色色/敗北色色

在與部分妖怪戰鬥時，會發生侵犯事件！

然後，如果輸給部分妖怪的話，會發生H事件！

・色情狀態

會計算做愛、肛交、與人或是妖怪進行色色的次數，

最新的H事件內容、喪失處女的回憶也會被記錄下來！

・淫亂程度

每次遭遇色色時，「淫亂程度」都會提升！

如果變得淫亂的話，在H事件中的反應也會發生變化……

・除主線劇情外的支線事件

除了主線劇情以外，也可以在遊廓中的支線劇情、

或是協助復興女角的村莊的支線劇情中，與女配角們進行交流。

・H事件中有配音！

本作中的H事件為全配音！

H事件全配音更加提升了本作的自慰品質。

・無GAME OVER

即使在戰鬥中敗北，也不會GAME OVER！

所以請儘管放心地輸給敵人吧！

・爆殺模式

搭載了可以省略與雜魚敵人戰鬥的「爆殺模式」！

也可以設定成「只與會進行色色攻擊的敵人戰鬥」，協助想快速遊玩的玩家！

▌角色介紹

▌角色介紹
data.short_description: 見義勇為的澪月穿越到了異世界，為拯救受苦的人民，她與妖狐巫女紅羽及女忍者雫那聯手對抗強敵。 旅途中她將面對來自敵人的各種性騷擾，甚至還得在花街出賣肉體——刺激又羞恥的異世界和風冒險就此展開！
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows® 11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)

data.name: Oni-no-Kuni: Miozuki's Descent
data.detailed_description:
▌Story Content

Shimomura Miozuki lives a vibrant life every day!

One day, crossing the zebra stripes, a blinding flash engulfed her!

When she came to, she was already in an isekai!

She arrived in a Wafu world ruled by the Great Oni, a menacing threat to humanity.

Miozuki, fueled by justice, joins Kureha, kitsune miko, and Shizuna, kunoichi, to fight!

Fighting fierce enemies while facing naughty, lustful traps!

▌Game Content

・Lewd Battles / Defeat Lewd Scenes

During battles with some yokai, violation events will occur!

And if you lose to some yokai, H-events will happen!

・H Status

Counts sex and lewd yokai encounters!

The latest H-event and memories of losing virginity will also be recorded!

・Lewdness Level

When encounters a lewd event, "Lewdness Level" will increase!

If becomes more lewd, reactions in H-events will also change...

・Side Events Beyond the Main Story

In addition to the main story, you can also engage in side stories in yukaku,

or assist in the reconstruction of the female characters' villages,

interacting with female supporting characters.

・H-Events are Fully Voiced!

The H-events in this game are fully voiced!

Full voice acting for H-events further enhances the game's erotic thrill!

・No Game Over

Even if you are defeated in battle, there is no GAME OVER!

So feel free to lose to your enemies!

・Blast Mode

We have a "Blast Mode" that allows you to skip battles with minor enemies!

You can also set it to "only fight enemies that perform lewd attacks,"

assisting players who want to play quickly!

 

▌Character Introduction

▌Character Introduction
data.short_description: Heroic Miozuki, in an isekai world, unites with Kureha the kitsune miko and Shizuna the kunoichi to crush foes and save suffering people! From vile harassment to forced prostitution, her journey is a descent into shame. A thrilling, shameful, Japanese fantasy awaits!!
data.supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows® 11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
